passives.name: Unanimity
passives.effects: Gain 20% of your teammate's {{as|attack damage}}, {{as|ability power}}, {{as|'''total''' attack speed}}, {{as|'''maximum''' health}}, {{as|armor}}, {{as|magic resistance}}, and {{as|ability haste}}, increased to 35% if they also have '''Twin Mask''' and are alive.

effects_structured.raw: Gain 20% of a teammate's AD, AP, total attack speed, max health, armor, magic resist, and ability haste.
If the teammate also has Twin Mask and is alive, gain 35% of those stats instead.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Unanimity stat-link updates dynamically with teammate live stats; base and doubled transfer ratios were aligned to current page-verified 15%/30% values.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
